policy_name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Medical Treatment Of Ex-Servicemen

sections.overview: This scheme provides financial assistance to non-pensioner Ex-Servicemen and their widows of ranks up to Havildar or equivalent to meet routine medical expenses, especially during old age when healthcare costs are high.
sections.objective: To support non-pensioner ex-servicemen and their widows who are financially weak by providing assistance for medical treatment and preventing financial hardship due to healthcare costs.
eligibility: Applicant must be a non-pensioner Ex-Serviceman or widow
Rank must be Havildar or equivalent and below
Must be recommended by the respective Zila Sainik Board
Medical expenditure must be incurred at recognized government hospitals under CGHS/ECHS rates
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹30,000 per year
Support provided for routine medical expenses
Separate scheme exists for serious diseases
applicationprocess: Register on the portal and fill required details
Fill and submit application with documents
Get documents attested by ZSWO and upload
Application is verified and recommended by ZSWO
Processed by Kendriya Sainik Board for approval
Payment is transferred through ECS after approval
Track status using DAK ID on portal
documents_required: Identity card issued by Zila Sainik Board
Original medical bills signed by doctor
Self-declaration of not receiving other medical assistance
Bank details of SBI or PNB account with IFSC

faq.question: Can treatment be taken in any hospital?
faq.answer: No, assistance is only for treatment in recognized government hospitals under CGHS/ECHS rates.

faq.question: Can bank details of any bank be provided?
faq.answer: No, only SBI or PNB bank account details are accepted.

faq.question: Whose bank account details should be provided?
faq.answer: The applicant must provide their Aadhaar-linked bank account details.
